name: stock_moves
title: Stock Moves
description: Immutable ledger of inventory movement: product_id moves quantity from from_location_id to to_location_id. Never updated once written -- stock LEVELS are derived by folding this log (see object_stock.py), never stored on this collection or anywhere else. Reconciled against a private predecessor-system catalog audit, not part of this repo (its StockMove model: 'immutable, levels DERIVED not stored'). This is the textbook append-mode collection per docs/append-only-storage-design.md: write-heavy, never updated, an inspectable audit trail by design -- see docs/storage-modes.md's 'Append (opt-in per collection)' section for what that changes about how this collection is physically written and read.

fields.name: from_location_id
fields.label: From Location
fields.help: Optional -- blank means an external origin (e.g. a purchase, where stock enters from outside any tracked location).

fields.name: to_location_id
fields.label: To Location
fields.help: Optional -- blank means an external destination (e.g. a sale, where stock leaves to outside any tracked location).

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quantity
fields.help: A count/measure, not money -- may be fractional. The one deliberate float-shaped exception in this package, same as app-orders' order_lines.quantity: Decimal arithmetic everywhere this is read (object_stock.py), never a bare float.

fields.name: unit_cost_cents
fields.label: Unit Cost (cents)
fields.help: Optional. Integer cents, never a float or currency type, per 00-doctrine-and-contract.md.

fields.name: reason
fields.label: Reason
fields.help: Matches the predecessor system's stock move reasons (reconciled against a private source audit, not part of this repo).

fields.name: reference
fields.label: Reference
fields.help: Free-text provenance pointer, e.g. an order id. No enforced relation -- this package has no hard dependency on app-orders.

fields.name: entity_id
fields.label: Entity
fields.help: The set of books this belongs to (65 multi-entity). Optional during rollout; backfilled to the owner's default entity, set by the entity switcher on new writes.
